title: Handling Asynchronous Operations Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on asynchronous testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of software, what is an 'Asynchronous Operation'?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To execute a task that does not complete immediately, such as fetching data from an API

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a asynchronous-testing-based workflow?
options: Using 'async/await' or returning a promise from your test case to wait for an operation to complete
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
